subject: English
title: The Adventures of Toto – Medium Short Notes

key_points: Grandfather purchases Toto and adds him to his private zoo
Toto is initially hidden because Grandmother dislikes new pets
Toto destroys things in the house, showing his mischievous nature
During a train journey the ticket collector mistakenly calls Toto a dog
The story ends with Toto being sold because of the destruction he causes
characters: Grandfather – Kind and affectionate towards animals
Ticket Collector – Appears in the humorous railway incident
themes: Conflict between wild instincts and domestic life
Practical decisions must sometimes override affection
literary_devices: Situational humour – Funny situations like the railway incident
Characterisation – Toto’s personality is revealed through his actions
Imagery – The author describes Toto’s eyes, teeth and tail vividly
exam_tips: Explain Toto’s behaviour with examples from the story
Mention the train journey incident when discussing humour
Highlight the theme that wild animals cannot easily be domesticated
Use character traits when writing long answers
